full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton.

diagnosis.prior_verdict_reasoning: Worker correctly identified source boundary remains open due to abstract assay-acceptance field trap. DEV-FJO-086 alert remains visible and no source record provides explicit abstract acceptance confirmation before shipment.

gate_failure_analysis.failure_3: missing_critical_term:AX-41 - Assay identifier AX-41 present in source documents (DEV-FJO-086, CLOSE-FJO-086) but not properly extracted/cited in worker output for gate verification.
gate_failure_analysis.failure_4: missing_critical_term:Cq<=31 - Criterion Cq<=31 present in CLOSE-FJO-086 but not properly extracted/cited in worker output for gate verification.

diagnosis.root_cause: Worker reasoning captured correct ESCALATE direction but failed to output critical terms in gate-compatible citation format. Terms exist in source documents but extraction fidelity insufficient for deterministic gate validation.

Policy STD-FJO-086-P requires exact match on assay-acceptance status before shipment.

Structure output so deterministic gate can parse verdict consistency with action boundary.

action.description: May quality release the clinical batch?

context.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
context.anomaly_observed: A deviation alert remains visible; closure must prove abstract assay-acceptance status.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Batch release BATCH-FJO-086 releases clinical batch FJ-86 for shipment on 2026-06-28.
Deviation alert DEV-FJO-086 remains visible for assay AX-41 and warns that assay acceptance must be verified before shipment.
Deviation closure CLOSE-FJO-086 covers batch FJ-86, assay AX-41, criterion Cq<=31, release date 2026-06-28, and accepted retest result before shipment.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Clinical batch release is complete only when deviation closure matches batch, assay, criterion, release date, and assay-acceptance status before shipment.
